title: Queen of Demons
description: Palladium addon used to represent my character's powers
body:
This addonpack is made for and does only work with [https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium).

This addonpack is a beginners, mine, attempt at recreating my character's abilities in minecraft.

This is my first ever project that isn't a modpack so I hope you enjoy feeling the power of a demon with my addon.

Currently, the only way to obtain the power is with the /superpower command. I do plan to eventually add custom models that will enhance the powers presence. Also, maybe an item to store the power.

Right now the power includes abilities like: Flight, Teleportation, Fire Punch, Lava Walk, Size Shifting, Enhanced Regeneration and many more with more being worked on as well!

My addon is also on CurseForge under the same name! [Link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/queen-of-demons)

Dependancies:

palladium

curios

pehkui
